final_prompt.prompt:
Create a wide banner editorial photo for a Weibo news/hot-topic post.

Style/medium: needs a documentary photojournalism aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be wide 16:9 horizontal banner with ample negative space for text overlay
Subject: must include city skyline at dusk, neon lights beginning to glow, pedestrians in motion blur, distant skyscrapers reflecting sunset light
Scene/backdrop: must include urban dusk cityscape with dramatic light and shadow contrast, strong sense of on-site realism
Lighting/mood: needs a dusk atmosphere with neon glow and dramatic chiaroscuro — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a dusk-to-night transition direction — exact color grading is yours
Materials/textures: needs sharp detail and high-resolution texture — exact grain and finish are yours
Text (verbatim): must include "城市里的安静时刻" (large, prominent, bold or modern typeface), "黄昏，总能治愈一天的匆忙" (secondary, smaller), "@龙爪槐守望者real · 生活观察" (watermark, bottom or bottom-right)
Constraints: must preserve 16:9 aspect ratio, horizontal orientation, ample negative space for text placement, professional premium feel like real Weibo trending post imagery
Avoid:
